meta.question: Are there any event-based gateways in this model? (Model ID: 1cd93309017949fdbebf0f7d7ea50b4a)
meta.finalAnswer:
Yes, there are two event-based gateways in the model with ID 1cd93309017949fdbebf0f7d7ea50b4a. Neither of them has an assigned name.

The URIs for these gateways are:
1. https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-0F7B0F2A-347E-44F9-A210-B32B8CC2E0CB
2. https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-771ED2AA-3718-491D-A68D-C931063229EA

request.reason: The query successfully identified two event-based gateways in the specified model. Both gateways exist but do not have assigned names.
